title: Helmet
overview: Desperate to make some quick money, Lucky and his friends rob an e-commerce company truck. But to their surprise, the looted boxes contain condoms instead of electronic gadgets. They decide to sell them directly to the people, who want the product but are too embarrassed to buy it publicly.
